en-US.title: GymTracker - Workout Log
en-US.subtitle: Track workouts, sets & progress
en-US.description:
GymTracker is a simple, focused workout logging app built for lifters who want to track their training without the clutter.

Features:
- Log workouts from templates or freestyle
- Track sets, reps, and weight for every exercise
- Automatic personal record detection
- Smart progression recommendations based on your performance
- View workout history and export data
- Progress charts per exercise
- Support for supersets, drop sets, warmup sets
- Counterweight exercise support (e.g. assisted pull-ups)
- Built-in rest timer
- Multiple gym profiles with equipment tracking
- Dark theme throughout

No account required. All data stays on your device.
en-US.promotionalText: Track your lifts. See your progress. Get smarter recommendations.

reviewInformation.notes: This app works entirely offline. No login required. Launch the app, select or create a workout template, and start logging sets. All data is stored locally on device using SQLite.
